codeReview.summary: Reviewed the import pipeline implementation, transcript skeleton, handoff, skill instructions, and commit diff. The feature imports teams, workflow states, labels, users, issues, parent-child links, mappings, and comments in the required order, preserves identifiers and timestamps, and its idempotency strategy aligns with the mission requirements.

summary: Reviewed feature `import-pipeline` via mission metadata, worker transcript skeleton, handoff, skill file, architecture docs, and commit `5d45c7f`. I did not find any high-confidence actionable correctness issues in this implementation.
